title: linkia × lucida
intro: Linkia × lucida, also known as the False Hellebore, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Ranunculaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is known to have various health benefits, such as reducing swelling and pain, as well as treating skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Linkia × lucida include infusions, tinctures, and creams, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
